explanation: The property states that globally, whenever the system is in PCV Mode (bool_exp1), the inspiratory valve pressure (P_insp) shall always be equal to the target inspiratory pressure of the PCV mode (P_inspPCV) (bool_exp3). This accurately translates the requirement that the target inspiratory pressure level is controlled and kept constant by the P_inspPCV parameter in PCV Mode.

The property states that globally, if the system is in PCV Mode (bool_exp1), then the inspiratory pressure will always be equal to the target inspiratory pressure for PCV mode (bool_exp3) for all subsequent states. This captures the requirement that the pressure is 'kept constant' while in PCV Mode.

The property states that globally, if the system is in PCV Mode, then the inspiratory valve pressure must be equal to the target inspiratory pressure of the PCV mode. This directly captures the requirement that the target inspiratory pressure is controlled by the parameter and kept constant when in PCV Mode.
